name: charts
description: D3/SVG declarative chart library for line, bar, area, scatter, pie, and other chart types with automatic resize handling and full TypeScript types.
when_to_use: D3/SVG declarative chart library for line, bar, area, scatter, pie, and other chart types with automatic resize handling and full TypeScript types
avoid: Not for canvas-based high-performance timeseries — use @gravity-ui/yagr. Not when chart type is managed via a plugin registry — use chartkit.

name: Chart
description: A flexible React chart component built on D3 that renders various chart types (line, bar, area, scatter, pie, etc.) using a declarative ChartData configuration. Automatically handles window resize, exposes a reflow imperative handle, and fires onReady/onResize callbacks with current dimensions.
when_to_use: When building data visualizations without needing the plugin abstraction of ChartKit
For direct D3-based chart rendering with full TypeScript types
When responsive auto-resize behavior is required
avoid: When Yagr-style canvas-based performance is needed for large timeseries — use Yagr instead
When chart type is managed through a plugin registry — use ChartKit instead

props.name: data
props.description: Declarative chart configuration and series data

props.name: onResize
props.description: Called on every resize event with current dimensions

props.name: onReady
props.description: Called when chart is fully initialized

ref: ChartRef — exposes reflow(options?: ChartReflowOptions) to trigger a manual resize update

name: ChartTooltipContent
description: A memoized React component that renders a chart tooltip. When a custom renderer is provided it delegates rendering to it; otherwise falls back to DefaultTooltipContent. Renders nothing when hovered data is absent.
when_to_use: When building a custom tooltip UI outside of the Chart component
When composing chart tooltips manually with custom renderer logic
avoid: For standard tooltip rendering inside Chart — the Chart component uses this internally already

props.name: hovered
props.description: Currently hovered data chunks to display in the tooltip

props.name: pinned
props.description: Whether the tooltip is pinned (locked in place)

props.name: renderer
props.description: Custom tooltip renderer function; overrides default content when provided

props.name: rowRenderer
props.description: Custom renderer for individual tooltip rows

props.name: headerFormat
props.description: Format configuration for the tooltip header

props.name: totals
props.description: Aggregated totals to show in tooltip

name: getDefaultTooltipHeaderFormat
description: Derives the default tooltip header format string for a set of chart series by inspecting series types and axis configuration. Returns undefined for chart types that do not use a header (pie, treemap, waterfall, sankey, radar, heatmap, funnel). For bar-y series it uses Y-axis domain; otherwise it uses X-axis domain.
when_to_use: When computing the automatic header format string to pass to ChartTooltipContent or a custom tooltip renderer
When you need to replicate the default tooltip header logic in a custom chart tooltip
avoid: Do not call on every render — memoize the result since series data rarely changes
signature: getDefaultTooltipHeaderFormat({ seriesData, yAxes, xAxis }: { seriesData: ChartSeries[]; yAxes?: ChartYAxis[]; xAxis?: ChartXAxis }): string | undefined

parameters.name: seriesData
parameters.description: Array of chart series to derive the format from

parameters.name: yAxes
parameters.description: Optional Y-axis configurations; used for bar-y series

parameters.name: xAxis
parameters.description: Optional X-axis configuration; used for all other series types

name: getFormattedValue
description: Formats a raw chart value (number, string, null, or undefined) using a ValueFormat or CustomFormat descriptor. Supports 'number' formatting via formatNumber, 'date' formatting via dateTimeUtc, and 'custom' formatting via a user-supplied formatter function. Falls back to String(value) for unrecognized formats.
when_to_use: When rendering formatted values in custom tooltip renderers or chart labels
When applying the same formatting logic used internally by the charts library to display consistent values
avoid: Do not use for axis tick labels — use formatAxisTickLabel from the internal utils instead
signature: getFormattedValue(args: { value: string | number | undefined | null; format?: ValueFormat | CustomFormat }): string

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Optional format descriptor controlling output style
